title: 142 by Biosemi
description: This dataset comprises electroencephalography (EEG) recordings from 142 participants during a laser-evoked pain experiment. Participants received fixed-intensity nociceptive stimuli at two levels (low and high pain) across three blocks of 10 stimuli each, followed by subjective pain intensity ratings on a 0-10 scale. The dataset provides neurophysiological correlates of pain perception and subjective pain assessment.
methods_description: EEG data were acquired using a Biosemi system during laser pain stimulation. Participants received fixed-intensity pain stimuli (3J/3.5J for participants 1-135; 3.5J/4J for participants 136-142) in three blocks of 10 stimuli each. After each stimulus, participants provided pain intensity ratings on a scale from 0 (no sensation) to 10 (unbearable pain). Participants were instructed to maintain fixation on a crosshair display and keep their eyes open throughout the experiment.
